title: Computer Systems Engineers/Architects
description: Design and develop solutions to complex applications problems, system administration issues, or network concerns. Perform systems management and integration functions.

tasks.text: Communicate with staff or clients to understand specific system requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Investigate system component suitability for specified purposes, and make recommendations regarding component use.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide customers or installation teams guidelines for implementing secure systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct the analysis, development, and operation of complete computer systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct the installation of operating systems, network or application software, or computer or network hardware.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor system operation to detect potential problems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Identify system data, hardware, or software components required to meet user needs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform ongoing hardware and software maintenance operations, including installing or upgrading hardware or software.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Verify stability, interoperability, portability, security, or scalability of system architecture.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Research, test, or verify proper functioning of software patches and fixes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Configure servers to meet functional specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collaborate with engineers or software developers to select appropriate design solutions or ensure the compatibility of system components.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design and conduct hardware or software tests.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate existing systems to determine effectiveness, and suggest changes to meet organizational requirements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Document design specifications, installation instructions, and other system-related information.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform security analyses of developed or packaged software components.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide technical guidance or support for the development or troubleshooting of systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Define and analyze objectives, scope, issues, or organizational impact of information systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Establish functional or system standards to address operational requirements, quality requirements, and design constraints.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop system engineering, software engineering, system integration, or distributed system architectures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide advice on project costs, design concepts, or design changes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate current or emerging technologies to consider factors such as cost, portability, compatibility, or usability.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Develop or approve project plans, schedules, or budgets.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Communicate project information through presentations, technical reports, or white papers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Train system users in system operation or maintenance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Complete models and simulations, using manual or automated tools, to analyze or predict system performance under different operating conditions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop efficient and effective system controllers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop application-specific software.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
